preserveUserBrands: assets/brands/* except assets/brands/example/ (example is updatable, user brands are not)
notes: v1.1.0: Platforms regrouped into Universal vs Brand Specific, voice input works on macOS, and every binary call now carries a signed license token.
whatsNew: Platforms split: Universal (one key everywhere) vs Brand Specific (per-brand OAuth)
Voice input now works on macOS — microphone entitlement shipped
Signed license token on every binary call — subscription enforced end-to-end
